revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|{{FA number}}}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE. -->
== About ==
This template places a small star ([[Image:Cscr-featured.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Featured article criteria|featured article criteria]], successfully passing a nomination on the [[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|featured article candidates page]]. It categorises them into [[:Category:Featured articles]].
== Usage ==
This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a featured article fails a [[Wikipedia:Featured article review|featured article review]], as well as from articles that have never passed through the featured article candidates process.
{{Top icon templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE, THANK YOU. --> [[Category:Top icon content award templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia featured content templates|Article]] [[Category:Title templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:

== About ==
This template places a small star ([[Image:Cscr-featured.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Featured article criteria|featured article criteria]], successfully passing a nomination on the [[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|featured article candidates page]]. It categorises them into [[:Category:Featured articles]].
== Usage ==
This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a featured article fails a [[Wikipedia:Featured article review|featured article review]], as well as from articles that have never passed through the featured article candidates process.

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|{{FA number}}}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE. -->
== About ==
This template places a small star ([[Image:Cscr-featured.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Featured article criteria|featured article criteria]], successfully passing a nomination on the [[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|featured article candidates page]]. It categorises them into [[:Category:Featured articles]].
== Usage ==
This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a featured article fails a [[Wikipedia:Featured article review|featured article review]], as well as from articles that have never passed through the featured article candidates process.
{{Top icon templates}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

== About ==
This template places a small star ([[Image:Cscr-featured.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Featured article criteria|featured article criteria]], successfully passing a nomination on the [[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|featured article candidates page]]. It categorises them into [[:Category:Featured articles]].
== Usage ==
This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a featured article fails a [[Wikipedia:Featured article review|featured article review]], as well as from articles that have never passed through the featured article candidates process.

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

== About ==
This template places a small star ([[Image:Cscr-featured.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Featured article criteria|featured article criteria]], successfully passing a nomination on the [[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|featured article candidates page]]. It categorises them into [[:Category:Featured articles]].
== Usage ==
This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a featured article fails a [[Wikipedia:Featured article review|featured article review]], as well as from articles that have never passed through the featured article candidates process.

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|{{FA number}}}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE. -->
== About ==
This template places a small star ([[Image:Cscr-featured.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Featured article criteria|featured article criteria]], successfully passing a nomination on the [[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|featured article candidates page]]. It categorises them into [[:Category:Featured articles]].
== Usage ==
This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a featured article fails a [[Wikipedia:Featured article review|featured article review]], as well as from articles that have never passed through the featured article candidates process.
{{Top icon templates}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Featured_article%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Featured_article%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|{{FA number}}}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE. -->
== About ==
This template places a small star ([[Image:Cscr-featured.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Featured article criteria|featured article criteria]], successfully passing a nomination on the [[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|featured article candidates page]]. It categorises them into [[:Category:Featured articles]].
== Usage ==
This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a featured article fails a [[Wikipedia:Featured article review|featured article review]], as well as from articles that have never passed through the featured article candidates process.
{{Top icon templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE, THANK YOU. --> [[:en:Category:Top icon content award templates|Category:Top icon content award templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia featured content templates|Article]] [[Category:Title templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|{{FA number}}}}
== About ==
This template places a small star ([[Image:Cscr-featured.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Featured article criteria|featured article criteria]], successfully passing a nomination on the [[Wikipedia:Featured article candidates|featured article candidates page]]. It categorises them into [[:Category:Featured articles]].
== Usage ==
This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a featured article fails a [[Wikipedia:Featured article review|featured article review]], as well as from articles that have never passed through the featured article candidates process.
{{Top icon templates}}
